allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path .npmrc\) { Write-Output "--- project .npmrc ---"; Get-Content .npmrc } else { Write-Output "no project .npmrc" }; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.npmrc"\) { Write-Output "--- user .npmrc ---"; Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.npmrc" } else { Write-Output "no user .npmrc" })
